The site falls back to the inline copy in index.html if this file is missing.
name: Peter Xing
headline: Futurist, keynote speaker and technologist working at the intersection of AI, longevity science and human augmentation.
bio: Peter Xing is a futurist, keynote speaker and technologist working at the intersection of artificial intelligence, longevity science and human augmentation. He is a Data & AI Specialist at Microsoft — helping the public sector and education adopt AI responsibly — and serves on the expert faculty at Singularity University covering transhumanism and emerging technologies.

He co-founded Transhumanism Australia, a non-profit community advancing healthy life extension, intelligence augmentation and human wellbeing through science and technology, and previously led emerging-technology and innovation practices at KPMG and Deloitte across generative AI, web3, automation and extended reality. His talks turn exponential change into something you can actually plan for — hope for the best, prepare for the worst, and help build the better branch.

roles.detail: Data & AI Specialist · Public Sector & Education

talks.title: AI Agents Will Run Your Workday by 2027
talks.blurb: How autonomous AI agents reshape every workflow — and how to stay augmented, not automated.

talks.title: Prepare for AGI

talks.title: AGI for Everyone: Empowering Individuals with AI
talks.blurb: Putting frontier AI in everyone's hands so individuals — not just institutions — capture the upside.

talks.title: AGI May Arrive Faster Than We Think
talks.blurb: On exponential timelines, GPT-class breakthroughs and decoupling work from income at the SUSA Summit launch.
